message:
refactor: Extract legacy compatibility layer to legacy_compat.zig

- Create runtime/legacy_compat.zig with TypeId enum, getTypeId,
  incref/decref, and type-based deallocation (127 lines)
- Update runtime.zig to import and re-export from legacy_compat.zig

runtime.zig: 1111 → 1010 lines (101 lines removed)

Total extracted so far:
- cpython.zig: 445 lines (CPython types, type objects, checks, refcount)
- legacy_compat.zig: 127 lines (TypeId, legacy incref/decref, dealloc)
